g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does an application server connect to an RDS database?')
sendPrompt('What is an RDS endpoint and why does it never change?')
sendPrompt('What makes the RDS primary instance the primary?')
sendPrompt('What is the RDS Multi-AZ standby and what can it do?')
sendPrompt('How long does RDS Multi-AZ failover take?')
g.text: primary fails → standby promoted → endpoint DNS updated
app reconnects to same endpoint — no code changes needed

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does RDS automatic backup work?')
sendPrompt('What is a manual RDS snapshot and when should I take one?')
g.text: manual snapshots → kept until you delete them
